title: dashboard pdf incomplete

posts.author: Azzir (Azzir)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Please do a fix on information in dashboards getting cut-off everytime you try to export to pdf a dashboard with a long list.

a lot of information is getting cut off based on how it’s displayed and even if you expand it to the maximum you can, it still happens. there should be an option to export a pdf regarding the complete information shown by each widget.

What are you trying to achieve

there should be an option to export a pdf regarding the complete information shown by each widget.
